zh.Gower, Glamorgan, Wales: 威爾士格拉莫爾根高維爾
zh.Glamorgan, Wales: 英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan於大約1360年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Gwlhaved Vychan32歲，母親Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan33歲。她於大約1379年與Leuan ap Eynon在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.Gower, Glamorgan, Wales: 威尔士格拉莫爾根高維爾
zh-hans.Glamorgan, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan于大约1360年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Gwlhaved Vychan32岁，母亲Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan33岁。她于大约1379年与Leuan ap Eynon在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Vychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan was born about 1360, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gwlhaved Vychan, was 32 and her mother, Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan, was 33. She married Leuan ap Eynon about 1379, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 9 daughters. She died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan est née environ 1360, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwlhaved Vychan, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Leuan ap Eynon environ 1379, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan um 1360 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwlhaved Vychan 32 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan 33. Sie hat um 1379 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom Leuan ap Eynon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Glamorgan, Wales: Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan è nata il circa 1360 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gwlhaved Vychan, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Leuan ap Eynon circa 1379, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.Gower, Glamorgan, Wales: ウェールズグラモーガンゴウエル
ja.Glamorgan, Wales: イギリスウェールズグラモーガン
ja.lifeSummary: Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychanが約1360年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Gwlhaved Vychanは32歳，母Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychanは33歳であった。約1379年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンでLeuan ap Eynonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwlhaved Vychan(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1379년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 Leuan ap Eynon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

mg.Glamorgan, Wales: Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.Glamorgan, Wales: Teyrnas Glywysing, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwlhaved Vychan, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Leuan ap Eynon aproximadamente 1379, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan родилась около 1360 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gwlhaved Vychan было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Leuan ap Eynon около 1379 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tanylwst ferch Gwlhaved Vychan nació aproximadamente 1360, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwlhaved Vychan, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs. Gwlhaved Vychan, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Leuan ap Eynon aproximadamente 1379, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
